## What & why

<!-- One or two sentences: what changes, and what problem/roadmap item it addresses. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` green locally
- [ ] No personal data touched (`profiles/`, `config.json`, `.env` stay out of the diff)
- [ ] Stays inside the CLAUDE.md invariants (deterministic stages stay deterministic; explicit input → output, fail-loud; byte-exact Notion select strings)
- [ ] CHANGELOG left alone (release notes are cut at ship time, not per-PR)
